tasks.title: Phase 1 – Foundation
tasks.description: Rebrand to BonsAI, public marketing site, protected app shell, Drizzle schema, Netlify migrations, env docs. Keep Neon Auth + Netlify deploy.
tasks.details: Landing page, /app dashboard, profiles/meal_plans/recipes/pantry schema, remove planets demo.
tasks.testStrategy: Build succeeds; public / loads; /app requires auth; migrations apply on deploy.

tasks.title: Phase 2 – Authentication & Billing
tasks.description: OAuth providers, Stripe Checkout/portal/webhooks, gate premium features by plan.
tasks.details: Google/Apple via Neon Auth; Stripe £7.99/mo and £69/yr; free tier limits.
tasks.testStrategy: Checkout creates subscription; webhooks update DB; premium routes blocked for free users.

tasks.title: Phase 3 – User Profiles
tasks.description: Onboarding for diet, allergies, goals, budget, skill, equipment, household, pantry basics.
tasks.details: Multi-step onboarding wizard; editable settings page.
tasks.testStrategy: Preferences persist and load into meal planner inputs.

tasks.title: Phase 4 – AI Meal Planning
tasks.description: Core product: generate personalized 7-day plans with recipes, nutrition, shopping list, leftovers.
tasks.details: OpenAI Responses API; regenerate single meals or whole plans.
tasks.testStrategy: Plan generates in under 30s; free tier enforces 5/month limit.

tasks.title: Phase 5 – Grocery Planner
tasks.description: Shopping lists from plans, budgeting, supermarket prefs, architecture for live pricing.
tasks.details: Aisle grouping; estimated spend; substitution suggestions.
tasks.testStrategy: List generated from plan; budget warnings shown.

tasks.title: Phase 6 – Scanner
tasks.description: Image upload, OCR, AI analysis for vegan/vegetarian/allergens/alternatives.
tasks.details: Blob storage for images; free tier 10 scans/month.
tasks.testStrategy: Label photo returns dairy detection and alternatives.

tasks.title: Phase 7 – Recipe Conversion
tasks.description: Vegan Swap Assistant for diet/budget/protein variants.
tasks.details: Show substitutions, nutrition estimates, updated instructions.
tasks.testStrategy: Lasagne → vegan variant with shopping list.

tasks.title: Phase 8 – Pantry & Leftovers
tasks.description: Pantry inventory and leftover meal generation.
tasks.details: AI uses pantry first; leftover ingredient → meals.
tasks.testStrategy: Pantry items reduce shopping list; leftover prompt returns recipes.

tasks.title: Phase 9 – Dashboards & Analytics
tasks.description: Nutrition dashboard, usage analytics, subscription metrics.
tasks.details: Daily/weekly/monthly macros and micronutrients; admin metrics later.

tasks.title: Phase 10 – Polish & Launch
tasks.description: Performance, a11y, SEO, email, marketing polish, beta launch.
tasks.details: Structured data, transactional email, production checklist.
tasks.testStrategy: Lighthouse/a11y pass; marketing pages convert to sign-up.
